name: Uranus
description:
__Race:__ God
__Height:__ 210 cm (6'11")
__Affiliation:__ Guild • Xenos

Uranos is the head of the Guild. Uranos follows the philosophy of ruling but not governing, leaving the matters of the Guild to Royman Mardeel, while he himself stays in the Room of Prayer under the Guild to use his divinity to keep monsters from coming out of the dungeon. He is quite stoic, having patiently watched over the dungeon for 1000 years, and is open to new ideas, being the first to believe that the Xenos could peacefully coexist with the people on the surface.
